purpose: Choose how derived data is computed and refreshed.

branches.use_when: The value is cheap to compute and must reflect the current request context.
Freshness can lag and workloads are scan-heavy.
branches.recommend: Batch computation with explicit freshness checks.

branches.use_when: Freshness matters and updates are continuous.
branches.recommend: Streaming computation with idempotent consumers and replay.
Materialized view or projection with invalidation/rebuild plan.

branches.use_when: Source databases must feed downstream systems with low application coupling.
branches.recommend: CDC with schema/version governance and replay controls.

failure_modes: Using streaming when batch freshness is sufficient.
Computing request-time values that create tail-latency spikes.
Backfilling without reconciling with live writes.
output_checks: Address late, duplicate, and out-of-order data.
Include monitoring for lag and correctness.
